title: braya purpurascens var. fernaldii
intro: Braya purpurascens var. fernaldii, also known as Fernald's bittercress, is a rare and little-studied variant of the Braya purpurascens plant, a member of the mustard family native to the arctic tundra. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the digestive system and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea. The health benefits of Braya purpurascens var. fernaldii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves and stems, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
